title: Spiking Vision Transformer with Saccadic Attention
abstract: This paper proposes a novel approach that combines Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) with Vision Transformers (ViTs) and incorporates saccadic attention mechanisms. It addresses the limitations of existing SNN-based ViT models that still rely on energy-intensive operations by introducing a Saccadic Spike Self-Attention mechanism tailored to the spatio-temporal characteristics of SNNs.
methodology: The paper introduces a Saccadic Spike Self-Attention mechanism that is inspired by biological saccadic mechanisms in vision systems. This approach aims to leverage the energy efficiency of SNNs while maintaining the high performance of ViTs.
key_contributions: Introduction of a novel Saccadic Spike Self-Attention mechanism
Addressing the limitations of existing SNN-based ViT models
Incorporating biological inspiration from saccadic mechanisms in vision systems
Focusing on both spatial and temporal aspects of SNNs
